entries.title: Baeck, Leo, Der Sinn der Geschichte, Berlin: Habel.
Bryant, Arthur, The Art of Writing History, Oxford: Oxford 1947
Cañal Barrachina, Avelino, Historia y destino, Havana: Ucar, García. 1947
Collingwood, R. G., The Idea of History, Clarendon (In German: Philosophie der Geschichte, trans. by Gertrud Herding, Stuttgart: Kohlhammer, 1955).
C. C. Webb, Hibbert Journal XLV (1946), 83-86.
R. Flenley, "Collingwood's Idea of History", Canadian Historical Review XXVIII (1947), 68-72.
M. Mandelbaum, Journal of Philosophy XLIV (1947), 184-188.
A. E. Murphy, Philosophical Review LVI (1947), 587-592.
W. H. Walsh, "Discussion: R. G. Collingwood's Philosophy of History", Philosophy XXVI (1947), 153-160.
G. Buchdahl, "Australasian Journal of Philosophy XXVI (1948), 94-114.
Leo Strauss, "On Collingwood's Philosophy of History", Review of Metaphysics V (1952), 559-586.
P. L. Gardiner, 'The Objects of Historical Knowledge', Philosophy XXVII (1952), 211-220.
R. W. Harris, "Collingwood's Idea of History", History N. S. XXXVII (1952), 1-7.
J. N. Hartt, "Metaphysics, History, and Civilization: Collingwood's Account of Their Interrelationship", Journal of Religion XXXIII (1953), 198-211.
Frederick D. Schneider, "Collingwood and the Idea of History", University of Toronto Quarterly XXII (1952-53), 172-183.
